title: botrychium matricariifolium var. lanceolatum
intro: Botrychium matricariifolium var. lanceolatum, commonly known as lance-leaf grapefern, is a type of rare and perennial plant in the family Ophioglossaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Botrychium matricariifolium var. lanceolatum include its ability to reduce swelling, treat wounds, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and grinding the leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application.
